[[File:Protocol_Team_2.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Ploovo Two-For-One/Legends|Ploovo Two-For-One]] (far right) with [[Durmag]], [[EV-4D9]] and [[Beatas]] (left to right)]]
'''Ploovo's Protocol Team''' was a criminal group that worked for crime lord [[Ploovo Two-For-One/Legends|Ploovo Two-For-One]].<ref name="AIR" />

The Protocol Team was a five-person group that specialized in obtaining money owed to Ploovo. Due to Ploovo's loan-shark activities, often multiple people were behind in their payments; in those cases, Ploovo sent the Protocol Team to collect the delinquent payments.<ref name="AIR" />

The Protocol Team used violence and the threat of violence to obtain the money. For unclear reasons, the Protocol Team was considered a threat by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="AIR" />

==Members==
The team was an efficient mix of aliens and droids. The members were:

*[[Beatas]], a [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] mercenary who led the Protocol Team. He began working for Ploovo in [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]].<ref name="AIR" />
*[[Durmag]], a [[Force pike/Legends|force-pike]]-wielding [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]], who started working for Ploovo shortly before [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]. Previously, Durmag worked for another crime lord, but that being traded Durmag to Ploovo for an undefined favor.<ref name="AIR" />
*[[EV-4D9]], a sadistic droid, bought after [[HN-TR1]] and [[Lotas]] expressed their interest in it.<ref name="AIR" />
*[[HN-TR1]], an assassin droid, was hired by Ploovo in [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]].<ref name="AIR" />
*[[Lotas]], a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]], began working for Ploovo in undisclosed situations.<ref name="AIR" />
